chunks.text: ORDER-SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Cr. Miscellaneous Application No.S-265 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on M.A.No.3834/2020 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection “A”. 3. For orders on M.A.No.3835/2020 (E/A) 4. For hearing of main case. 18.09.2020. Mr. Idrees Ahmed Mangi, Advocate for the applicant. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 01. Urgency granted. 02. Overruled. 03. Exemption granted subject to all just exception. 04. The applicant by way of instant Crl.Misc.Application has sought for setting aside the order dated 12.08.2020, passed by learned Special Judge Anti-Corruption (Provincial), Larkana, whereby the private respondents have been admitted to pre- arrest bail, as the same according to learned counsel for the applicant has been passed without providing chance of hearing to the applicant, who was the complainant of the case. If it is believed that the private respondents have been admitted to pre-arrest bail by learned trial Court improperly and without providing chance of hearing to the applicant, then the applicant was having remedy to seek for cancellation of such bail by way of making an application under section 497 Cr.PC either before learned trial Court or before this Court. Straight away asking for setting aside the bail order by making the instant Crl.Misc.Application before this Court in exercise of its instant jurisdiction under the pretext of being unheard, the inherit jurisdiction is not called for. Consequently, the instant Crl.Misc.Application being misconceived is dismissed in limine. J U D G E
